user.title: Sonos Hue Sync
user.description: Update the speaker, Hue targets, and palette behavior.

data_description.sonos_entity: Choose the Sonos media player to follow. For grouped speakers, choose the room that shows the active track title, artist, album, and album art.
data_description.light_entities: Main targets to control. Select the Hue room/group you normally want synced, or select individual lights. If a selected room/group exposes its member lights, colors are distributed across those members.
data_description.group_entities: Optional additive workaround. Add real Hue room, zone, or group entities only when the main Hue lights / groups selection does not expose all of its members. These are added to the main targets, not used instead of them. Avoid adding helper zones here if you do not want the entire zone treated as one target.
data_description.member_light_entities: Optional additive override. Add specific individual lights that should always be controlled directly. Use this for missing bulbs or Hue Play lights when group expansion does not resolve them. Do not add room/group helper entities here.
data_description.color_count: Number of colors to extract from album art. If there are more target lights than colors, colors repeat.
data_description.transition: Fade time in seconds for each light change. Higher values are smoother but slower; lower values respond faster.
data_description.filter_dull: Remove black, gray, muddy, or very dark colors while keeping useful color tones.
data_description.filter_bright_white: Remove harsh pure or cool white colors while keeping warmer cream and soft white tones.
data_description.monochrome_mode: Controls black, white, or grayscale artwork. Warm neutral avoids random colors and harsh white; Preserve grayscale uses soft grays; Muted accent adds restrained color; Disabled uses normal extraction.
data_description.low_color_handling: When album art has only subtle color, use a restrained muted palette instead of allowing tiny color noise to become overly saturated.
data_description.cache: Reuse colors for album art that has already been processed. Disable while tuning palette behavior if you want every extraction recalculated.
data_description.expand_groups: When enabled, colors are applied to individual lights inside selected groups when Home Assistant exposes those members. Disable only if you want one color applied to each selected group entity.
data_description.assignment_strategy: Controls how colors are assigned after extraction. Balanced usually gives the most color variety. Brightness order sorts by lightness and can make similar hues dominate. Sequential follows palette order. Alternating bright / dim mixes light and dark colors.
data_description.true_gradient_mode: Experimental. Use Hue direct control for supported gradient lights.
data_description.gradient_color_points: Number of color points sent to supported gradient lights.
data_description.gradient_order_mode: Choose whether gradient lights use the same color order, an offset order per light, or a deterministic random order per track.
data_description.min_brightness: Lowest brightness Sonos Hue Sync may apply to standard lights.
data_description.max_brightness: Highest brightness Sonos Hue Sync may apply to standard lights.
data_description.gradient_brightness: Maximum brightness used for supported gradient lights when True Gradient is enabled.
data_description.exclude_light_entities: Lights that should never be controlled, even if they are part of a selected group.
data_description.restore_delay: Seconds to wait after music stops before restoring the previous light state. If music resumes during the delay, restore is cancelled.
data_description.artwork_fallback_mode: Controls what happens when album art cannot be retrieved, which can happen with AirPlay or some Sonos sources.

init.title: Sonos Hue Sync options
init.description: Update the speaker, Hue targets, and palette behavior.

extract_now.name: Refresh Colors
extract_now.description: Force fresh album-art extraction and apply colors immediately.

apply_last_palette.name: Reapply Colors
apply_last_palette.description: Apply the most recently extracted colors again.

test_rainbow.name: Test Lighting
test_rainbow.description: Apply a test palette to verify target distribution.

show_help.name: Help & Guide
show_help.description: Open a quick guide with setup, troubleshooting, and diagnostics instructions.

health_check.name: Health Check
health_check.description: Check Sonos, Hue, targets, gradients, and recent processing status.

enabled.name: Sync Enabled
enabled.description: Enable or disable automatic light syncing.

filter_dull.name: Remove Dull Colors
filter_dull.description: Remove gray, muddy, and low-saturation tones.

filter_bright_white.name: Reduce Harsh Whites
filter_bright_white.description: Reduce pure/cool whites while keeping cream and warm whites.

low_color_handling.name: Stabilize Low-Color Artwork
low_color_handling.description: Keep nearly monochrome covers from becoming overly saturated.

expand_groups.name: Distribute Across Group Lights
expand_groups.description: Apply colors to individual lights inside groups when available.

true_gradient_mode.name: Enable True Gradient
true_gradient_mode.description: Use Hue direct control for supported gradient lights.

assignment_strategy.name: Color Distribution Mode
assignment_strategy.description: Choose how extracted colors are distributed across lights.

monochrome_mode.name: Black & White Handling
monochrome_mode.description: Choose how black-and-white album art becomes light colors.

gradient_order_mode.name: Gradient Pattern
gradient_order_mode.description: Choose the color order used by supported gradient lights.

color_count.name: Number of Colors
color_count.description: Set the number of colors extracted from album art.

transition.name: Transition Time
transition.description: Set the fade duration for light changes.

gradient_color_points.name: Gradient Detail Level
gradient_color_points.description: Set the number of color points sent to gradient lights.

min_brightness.name: Minimum Brightness
min_brightness.description: Lowest brightness Sonos Hue Sync may apply to standard lights.

max_brightness.name: Maximum Brightness
max_brightness.description: Highest brightness Sonos Hue Sync may apply to standard lights.

gradient_brightness.name: Gradient Brightness
gradient_brightness.description: Maximum brightness used for supported gradient lights when True Gradient is enabled.

restore_delay.name: Restore Delay
restore_delay.description: Seconds to wait after music stops before restoring the previous light state. If music resumes during the delay, restore is cancelled.

show_help.name: Show help
show_help.description: Show a Sonos Hue Sync guide, including diagnostics instructions.

health_check.name: Health check
health_check.description: Run a Sonos Hue Sync health check and show the result as a Home Assistant notification.
